# Seth M.R. Jaipuria School — Anti-Bullying Website

> A confidential incident reporting platform by the Digital Campaign Club at Seth M.R. Jaipuria School. Students can safely and privately report bullying incidents to school administrators.

The site provides a simple, confidential channel for students to report bullying and other incidents. Reports are only visible to school administrators; submitters receive a tracking code to check for private replies from the school team.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the anti-bullying reporting service and entry point to submit or track a report.
- [Report an Incident](/report): Form to submit a confidential bullying incident report, with optional witness photo.

## Optional

- [Check Reply](/track/): Look up the status and admin reply for a submitted report using a tracking code.
